summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-7, REQ-8, REQ-9) with good coverage. A DrawingCanvas component is added, the Sender page gets a Text/Draw mode toggle and canvas integration, the Recipient page detects image data URLs and renders them as , and the backend uses Motoko's Text type which handles large strings. One minor concern: REQ-7 explicitly requires a 'stroke size option' — the diff does include strokeSize controls (Minus/Plus buttons). REQ-9's backend changes are minimal (just a migration module added, no explicit payload size increase), but Motoko Text inherently supports large strings. Overall the implementation is solid with no significant missing requirements or hallucinated features.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (migration.mo) was added as a no-op pass-through
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a migration module or any schema migration mechanism. While harmless, this was not requested.
